message:
fix: Agent code review - race conditions, security, and resource leaks

Coordinator:
- Fix TOCTOU race in Stop()/Start() by capturing channels under lock
  before operating on them, preventing race with Start() creating new
  channels mid-Stop()

Deploy:
- Add shellEscape() helper for SSH command injection prevention
- Apply shell escaping to all path interpolations in SSH commands
- Escape tempPath, home, unitDir, and service names

PTY:
- Rewrite ReadLine() and WaitForPattern() to use select() with
  100ms timeouts instead of blocking goroutines
- Eliminates goroutine leaks when context is cancelled
- Remove unused bufio.Reader field and outputBuf from struct

Refresh:
- Add readLimitedBody() helper with 64KB max to prevent memory
  exhaustion from large error responses
- Apply bounded reads to codex.go and gemini.go error handling

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -5,7 +5,6 @@ import (
 	"context"
 	"encoding/json"
 	"fmt"
-	"io"
 	"net/http"
 	"os"
 	"time"
@@ -57,7 +56,8 @@ var RefreshCodexToken = func(ctx context.Context, refreshToken string) (*TokenRe
 	defer resp.Body.Close()
 
 	if resp.StatusCode != http.StatusOK {
-		body, err := io.ReadAll(resp.Body)
+		// Use bounded read to prevent memory exhaustion from large error responses
+		body, err := readLimitedBody(resp.Body)
 		if err != nil {
 			return nil, fmt.Errorf("codex refresh error %d (failed to read body: %v)", resp.StatusCode, err)
 		}

@@ -5,7 +5,6 @@ import (
 	"encoding/json"
 	"errors"
 	"fmt"
-	"io"
 	"net/http"
 	"net/url"
 	"os"
@@ -68,7 +67,8 @@ var RefreshGeminiToken = func(ctx context.Context, clientID, clientSecret, refre
 	defer resp.Body.Close()
 
 	if resp.StatusCode != http.StatusOK {
-		body, err := io.ReadAll(resp.Body)
+		// Use bounded read to prevent memory exhaustion from large error responses
+		body, err := readLimitedBody(resp.Body)
 		if err != nil {
 			return nil, fmt.Errorf("gemini refresh error %d (failed to read body: %v)", resp.StatusCode, err)
 		}

@@ -6,6 +6,7 @@ import (
 	"encoding/json"
 	"errors"
 	"fmt"
+	"io"
 	"os"
 	"path/filepath"
 	"time"
@@ -14,6 +15,10 @@ import (
 	"github.com/Dicklesworthstone/coding_agent_account_manager/internal/health"
 )
 
+// maxErrorBodySize limits how much of an error response body we read.
+// Prevents memory exhaustion from malicious/buggy servers.
+const maxErrorBodySize = 64 * 1024 // 64KB
+
 // DefaultRefreshThreshold is the time before expiry to trigger a refresh.
 const DefaultRefreshThreshold = 10 * time.Minute
 
@@ -294,3 +299,10 @@ func snapshotMatchesProfile(fileSet authfile.AuthFileSet, vault *authfile.Vault,
 
 	return true
 }
+
+// readLimitedBody reads up to maxErrorBodySize bytes from the reader.
+// This prevents memory exhaustion from malicious or buggy servers that
+// might return unexpectedly large error responses.
+func readLimitedBody(r io.Reader) ([]byte, error) {
+	return io.ReadAll(io.LimitReader(r, maxErrorBodySize))
+}
